problem id: bf002000
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  11101010 -> 01010110
  01000101 -> 00101010
  11100100 -> 00100110
  11010111 -> 10111111
  11000011 -> 00011111
  10111011 -> 11011100
  01010000 -> 10000010
  00010101 -> 10101000
  11111111 -> 11111110

query: 00011001
predicted answer: 11001000
